description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Extra CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: linux and clang. The linux job uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest with different configurations (TBB, OpenMP, noexcept, and xsimd), while the clang job runs on windows-latest. For each job, check out the code, set up a conda environment, configure using CMake, install, build, and run tests.
